source: Invest Like the Best — The cyclone under the surface (EP.260)
summary: The metaverse is real and coming, but today's true metaverses are video games (Roblox, Fortnite, World of Warcraft, Destiny, Minecraft)

tickers_audited.reasoning: Baker explicitly named Roblox as one of the true existing metaverses where real commerce occurs — directly connected to this thesis.

Baker explicitly named Minecraft (owned by Microsoft) as one of the true existing metaverses, and the thesis summary specifically calls out Minecraft/Microsoft as a favored gaming platform with existing metaverse-like ecosystems.

Baker explicitly called out Apple's forthcoming headset as a hardware catalyst and identified Apple as a mobile OS platform owner with profound structural advantages in the XR/metaverse transition — directly connected to this thesis.
Baker explicitly identified Google/Android as the other mobile OS platform owner with structural advantages in the metaverse/XR transition — directly connected to this thesis.
Baker explicitly expressed excitement about PlayStation VR by name as a hardware catalyst in the VR/XR convergence — Sony is the direct subject of that specific callout within this thesis.
